svg.title: git-fire icon — V4 Ultra-minimal
svg.desc: Variant 4: three elements only — commit dot (circle), edge stem (line), flame (path). Works at 16 px favicon scale. No gradients on graph elements; thick strokes for legibility. Flame has a slight rightward lean at the tip. Inspired by GitHub's commit dot, a match head, and a hazard warning badge. This is the design promoted to production in assets/git-fire-icon.svg.
